findings.message: Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
comm_network is not a validated AFSIM command in this project corpus; use supported comm blocks instead
end_comm_network closes an unsupported comm_network block
task must be nested under processor
task must be nested under processor
output is not a valid standalone AFSIM command in scenario scope
end_time must appear at top level, not inside another block

repair_steps.issue: missing end_weapon
repair_steps.repair_hint: Use stack-based block matching and insert the matching end_xxx for the nearest unclosed block.
repair_steps.suggested_action: append missing closing tag `end_weapon`

repair_steps.issue: missing end_sensor
repair_steps.repair_hint: Use stack-based block matching and insert the matching end_xxx for the nearest unclosed block.
repair_steps.suggested_action: append missing closing tag `end_sensor`

repair_steps.issue: Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
repair_steps.repair_hint: Render components from type-specific templates and move parameters into legal sub-blocks.
repair_steps.suggested_action: regenerate the affected layer using a component-specific template

repair_steps.repair_hint: Render components from type-specific templates and move parameters into legal sub-blocks.

findings.message: Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
comm_network is not a validated AFSIM command in this project corpus; use supported comm blocks instead
end_comm_network closes an unsupported comm_network block
task must be nested under processor
task must be nested under processor
output is not a valid standalone AFSIM command in scenario scope

repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
# Scenario: brawler_1v1
# Description: One versus one Brawler air combat engagement with behavior tree decision logic.
# Duration: 300 sec

side blue
  display_name Blue
side red
  display_name Red

location blue_spawn
  position 0.03s 0.01w
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_location

location red_spawn
  position 0.03n 0.01e
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_location

network brawler_network WSF_COMM_NETWORK_AD_HOC
end_network

platform_type PT_BLUE_FLIGHT_LEAD WSF_PLATFORM
  mover BrawlerMover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
    max_speed 1.2 mach
    climb_rate 50000 ft/min
    turn_rate 15 deg/s
  end_mover
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  comm BrawlerDatalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
    network_name brawler_network
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_BLUE_WINGMAN WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM
  mover BrawlerMover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
    max_speed 1.2 mach
    climb_rate 50000 ft/min
    turn_rate 15 deg/s
  end_mover
  sensor BrawlerSensor WSF_GEOMETRIC_SENSOR
    azimuth_field_of_view 60 deg
    elevation_field_of_view 30 deg
    maximum_range 50 nm
    frame_time 1 sec
  end_sensor
  weapon Sidewinder WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE
    quantity 2
    salvo_interval 0.5 sec
  end_weapon
  weapon Gun WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
    quantity 500
  end_weapon
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor Perception WSF_PERCEPTION_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor IncomingThreats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor DataMgr WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  comm BrawlerDatalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
    network_name brawler_network
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_RED_FLIGHT_LEAD WSF_PLATFORM
  mover BrawlerMover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
    max_speed 1.2 mach
    climb_rate 50000 ft/min
    turn_rate 15 deg/s
  end_mover
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  comm BrawlerDatalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
    network_name brawler_network
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_RED_WINGMAN WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM
  mover BrawlerMover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
    max_speed 1.2 mach
    climb_rate 50000 ft/min
    turn_rate 15 deg/s
  end_mover
  sensor BrawlerSensor WSF_GEOMETRIC_SENSOR
    azimuth_field_of_view 60 deg
    elevation_field_of_view 30 deg
    maximum_range 50 nm
    frame_time 1 sec
  end_sensor
  weapon Sidewinder WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE
    quantity 2
    salvo_interval 0.5 sec
  end_weapon
  weapon Gun WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
    quantity 500
  end_weapon
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor Perception WSF_PERCEPTION_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor IncomingThreats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor DataMgr WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  comm BrawlerDatalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
    network_name brawler_network
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform blue_flight_lead PT_BLUE_FLIGHT_LEAD
  side blue
  position 0.03s 0.01w
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform blue_wingman PT_BLUE_WINGMAN
  side blue
  position 0.03s 0.01w altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform red_flight_lead PT_RED_FLIGHT_LEAD
  side red
  position 0.03n 0.01e
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform red_wingman PT_RED_WINGMAN
  side red
  position 0.03n 0.01e altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

behavior intercept_behavior
  type WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  weapon air_to_air_missile
  sensor air_radar
  engagement_style brawler_tactical
end_behavior

comm_network brawler_net
  type WSF_COMM_NETWORK_AD_HOC
  frequency 123.0 mhz
end_comm_network

task_group brawler_engagement
  task blue_lead_engage
    assignee blue_flight_lead
    task_type intercept
    target red_flight_lead
    behavior intercept_behavior
  end_task
  task blue_wing_engage
    assignee blue_wingman
    task_type intercept
    target red_wingman
    behavior intercept_behavior
  end_task
end_task_group

event_output engagement_output
  file_name "brawler_engagement_events.txt"
  format text
end_event_output

event_pipe brawler_pipe
  event_type engagement
  filter id == "brawler_air_engagement"
  output engagement_output
end_event_pipe

end_weapon
end_sensor
end_time 300 sec

findings.message: Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
Brawler-family components require platform_type WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM, not WSF_PLATFORM
WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
comm_network is not a validated AFSIM command in this project corpus; use supported comm blocks instead
end_comm_network closes an unsupported comm_network block
task must be nested under processor
task must be nested under processor
output is not a valid standalone AFSIM command in scenario scope

repair_steps.issue: end_weapon closes sensor from line 138
repair_steps.repair_hint: Use stack-based block matching and insert the matching end_xxx for the nearest unclosed block.
repair_steps.suggested_action: repair block nesting first, then rerun static verification

repair_steps.issue: end_sensor closes weapon from line 137
repair_steps.repair_hint: Use stack-based block matching and insert the matching end_xxx for the nearest unclosed block.
repair_steps.suggested_action: repair block nesting first, then rerun static verification

    quantity 500
  end_weapon
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor Perception WSF_PERCEPTION_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor IncomingThreats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor DataMgr WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  comm BrawlerDatalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
    network_name brawler_network
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform blue_flight_lead PT_BLUE_FLIGHT_LEAD
  side blue
  position 0.03s 0.01w
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform blue_wingman PT_BLUE_WINGMAN
  side blue
  position 0.03s 0.01w altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform red_flight_lead PT_RED_FLIGHT_LEAD
  side red
  position 0.03n 0.01e
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform red_wingman PT_RED_WINGMAN
  side red
  position 0.03n 0.01e altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

event_pipe
  file output/brawler_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
  file output/brawler_1v1.evt
  disable all
  enable PLATFORM_ADDED
end_event_output

end_time 300 sec
